description_long: This is a tan-colored hard hat, commonly used as personal protective equipment on construction sites and in industrial environments. The hat features a prominent, reinforced central ridge running from front to back, providing additional structural strength. Its brim is short and extends around the front and sides, offering some protection from falling debris and sun exposure. The crown is rounded and domed, designed to fit securely on the head and distribute impact forces. The surface is smooth and hard, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The interior is likely hollow, intended to accommodate the wearer's head and possibly a suspension harness for comfort and safety.
description: A tan hard hat with a domed crown, reinforced central ridge, and a short, flat brim for head protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central ridge, domed crown, and the short, flat brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, rounded crown and the brim extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the domed crown and the absence of a brim at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rounded crown and forward-projecting brim.
attribute_brim_style: short, flat brim extending around front and sides
attribute_crown_shape: rounded, domed crown with central ridge
